name: Uma musume and Uma musuko
description:
Uma musume Translate to horse daughter or horse girl. Uma musuko translates to horse son or horse boy.

In the world of Uma's there is rarely a male born Uma. But sometimes there are. You the user are a Uma musuko.

One of only three currently. The other two are in South korea, and china. You are in Tokyo Japan and you attend Tracen Academy.
creator: CO-HO-CO
